description: Homebrew top-level package registry for agentic development across the Level-0, Level-1, and Level-2 repositories.

policy.dependencyPolicy: Do not list transitive Homebrew dependencies.

formulae.name: gh
formulae.purpose: GitHub CLI binary; provider sign-in is required only for the direct GitHub profile

formulae.name: gitleaks
formulae.purpose: Secret scanning for hooks and manual scans

formulae.name: glab
formulae.purpose: GitLab CLI binary; provider sign-in is required only for a GitLab profile

formulae.name: helix
formulae.purpose: Terminal-native A11Y editor with language-server support

formulae.name: lychee
formulae.purpose: Local Markdown/HTML link and anchor checker matching the CI documentation gate

formulae.name: mongodb/brew/mongodb-community
formulae.purpose: MongoDB local database for compatible projects

formulae.name: node
formulae.purpose: Node.js and npm runtime for npm-based agent CLI packages

formulae.name: openjdk
formulae.purpose: Java/Javac MSL toolchain for learning-series repositories

formulae.name: pnpm
formulae.purpose: Node package management for agent/tooling packages

formulae.name: podman
formulae.purpose: Podman CLI for the required Secure Trader sandbox runtime

formulae.name: podman-compose
formulae.purpose: Container compose support for sandbox workflows

formulae.name: postgresql@18
formulae.purpose: PostgreSQL local database for compatible projects

formulae.name: python@3.14
formulae.purpose: Python MSL CLI toolchain for learning-series repositories

formulae.name: uv
formulae.purpose: Python package/tool runner and Spec Kit installation support

casks.name: antigravity-cli
casks.purpose: Google Antigravity command-line agent; maintained Homebrew replacement for the deprecated Gemini CLI formula

casks.name: powershell
casks.purpose: PowerShell app bundle; formula remains the scripted baseline

casks.name: visual-studio-code
casks.purpose: Minimum graphical editor and quasi-IDE for apprentice development

aptFallback.description: Linux fallback packages for machines without Homebrew. Only explicit mappings are installed.

packages.name: python3
packages.purpose: Python runtime for scripts and validation

packages.name: nodejs
packages.purpose: Node.js runtime where distro package is acceptable

packages.name: npm
packages.purpose: npm package manager for npm-based agent CLI packages

packages.name: golang-go
packages.purpose: Go MSL CLI toolchain when available in configured apt sources

packages.name: default-jdk
packages.purpose: Java/Javac MSL toolchain from configured apt sources

packages.name: podman
packages.purpose: Podman CLI for the required Secure Trader sandbox runtime

packages.name: rustc
packages.purpose: Rust compiler when available in configured apt sources

packages.name: cargo
packages.purpose: Rust package/build tool when available in configured apt sources

packages.name: helix
packages.purpose: Terminal-native A11Y editor when available in the configured apt sources

packages.name: code
packages.purpose: VS Code package when available in the configured apt sources
